title: minuartia geniculata var. poiretiana
intro: Minuartia geniculata var. poiretiana, also known as a variety of the alpine cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species belonging to the pink family of plants. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic and astringent. The health benefits of Minuartia geniculata var. poiretiana include treating wounds and skin conditions, and it is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties that can aid in the relief of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
